data.name: Pornocrates
data.detailed_description:
Inspired by Félicien Rops’ iconic painting, Pornocrates is an interactive work that blends social critique, stylized sensuality, and allegory. Taking on the role of the enigmatic queen of pleasure, players enter a symbolic universe where eroticism is treated as art, and human instincts are explored with refinement and boldness.

The game unfolds across three levels, each representing a hedonistic celebration in one of the hostess’s private chambers. Sixteen illustrious guests — eccentric figures from diverse cultures — are challenged to navigate trials of charm, intelligence, and emotional surrender. The goal is not merely to win Pornocrates’ attention, but to achieve a profound, symbolic, and overwhelming connection with the ideal of absolute pleasure she embodies.

Those who succeed earn not only material rewards but also a place of honor in her intimate circle. Those who fail undergo a transformative journey: they become "Pigs" — an allegorical symbol of unrefined desire, greed, and self-degradation. But luxury bears a hidden warning: before the fall comes the judgment of others. And in this house of mirrors, all reflect their own vices. Pornocrates is not a game about sex. It is a metaphor about power, desire, identity, and the fine line between the sublime and the grotesque.

“Pornography is simply a description of carnal pleasures; eroticism is the same description revalued, based on an idea of love or social life. Everything erotic is necessarily also pornographic.” — Self-definition of Queen Pornocrates

Playing is extremely easy because you can use your computer's keyboard and mouse or you can choose a joystick.

During the game you can:

Collect items are hidden in the mansion.
Protect yourself from attacks.
Read messages and save them in inventory to review later,

data.short_description: Inspired by Félicien Rops' iconic painting, Pornocrates is an interactive work that blends social critique, stylized sensuality, and allegory. Taking on the role of the enigmatic queen of pleasure, players enter a symbolic universe where eroticism is treated as art and refined human instincts.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5-11600K
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVidia RTX 2060 and AMD RX 5500
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 12 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Intel Core i7-10700K
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA GEFORCE RTX 2070, AMD RX5700 XT or Higher
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 15 GB 可用空間

data.legal_notice:
2020© PORNOCRATES | COPYRIGHT by Orgipix Studios
Based in 'Pornocrates' created in 1896 by Felicien Rops.
